name: argo
description: Argo's portable engineering 'way of working' for Claude Code — opinionated but non-breaking. Ships active: on-demand discipline skills, full-lifecycle agent roles, and safety-only guardrail hooks. Opinionated rules ship inert as templates the setup-claude skill installs adapted to the host project's stack. Works in any project, with or without the Argo cockpit. See README.
